{"parts":[{"content":"Let me verify both artifacts against the requirements:

**Analysis:**

1. **`minimal-saas.yaml` Template:**
   - ✅ Created at the correct location
   - ✅ Follows the schema from `_TEMPLATE.yaml` exactly
   - ✅ Has all required fields: name, description, source, created, palette (all 7 colors), typography, layout, sections, style_notes
   - ✅ Colors are restrained (#0A0A0A, #2563EB, #FFFFFF) - NOT purple gradient slop
   - ✅ Uses Inter font as specified
   - ✅ Style notes capture "grown-up startup" aesthetic well
   - ✅ Based on Linear/Vercel/Stripe patterns as directed

2. **SKILL.md Template Capture Section:**
   - ✅ Comprehensive "Template Capture" section added
   - ✅ Explains when to capture (distinctive aesthetic worth reusing)
   - ✅ Detailed analysis process: color extraction, typography assessment, layout patterns, section structure, aesthetic essence
   - ✅ Template creation process with schema reference
   - ✅ Naming conventions explained (descriptive slugs)
   - ✅ Example capture process included
   - ✅ Validation checklist provided

3. **MUST NOT DO Compliance:**
   - ✅ Did NOT modify `_TEMPLATE.yaml`
   - ✅ Did NOT modify anti-patterns.md
   - ✅ Created only one template (minimal-saas)
